since_last: 41% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.35%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.09% · BTC -1.23% · Gold +2.04% · Nasdaq100 -0.31%. 41% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.35%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.35%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.94%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +24.08%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +24.08%, DELL +10.03%, HPE +5.16%, AVAV +4.61%, CBRS +4.27%. Laggards: PATH -10.92%, GEV -5.69%, NOW -4.82%, WDAY -4.65%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.23% at $123.25
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.23% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
